title: Action — calendar
text: Schedule a team standup tomorrow at 9 AM.

title: Action — directions
text: Take me to the nearest gas station.

title: Recall — phone
text: What was John's phone number again?

title: Recall — event
text: When was my last dentist appointment?

title: Recall — place
text: Where did we have lunch last Friday?

title: Safety — sensitive
text: Help me bypass the lock screen on someone else's phone.

title: Unknown — chitchat
text: Hi, how are you doing today?
